superheroes/audit-debt: accumulated technical, security, and architectural debt
rather than reviewing a single change
superheroes/review-code: reviewing code changes on a local branch or an open pull request
auto-fixed locally or posted to GitHub
superheroes/review-spec: the plain-language requirements / the *what* for a work-item
superheroes/test-pilot-execute: test-pilot plan should be exercised before human spot-check
Drives the app via a browser MCP
superheroes/test-pilot-init: refresh test-pilot's profile, seeding blocks, and browser tooling layer
superheroes/test-pilot-plan: PR/branch needs a manual test plan with seeded data
Seeds scenarios via the test-pilot engine
posts a checkbox plan to the PR
Does NOT execute the plan (that is test-pilot-execute)
superheroes/architect-discovery: START of any new piece of work in a superheroes project
Elicits requirements (incl. significant unhappy paths) with the owner
superheroes/architect-spec: author the on-disk `spec` definition-doc once an owner has APPROVED
superheroes/configure: set up, fix, view, or tune a project's superheroes calibration
the single front door for superheroes configuration
see the whole project's calibration on one screen
move a project between in-repo and out-of-repo storage
